title: gh#20: Tests: Transcode worker processor has zero test coverage
reasoning:
Imported from https://github.com/joshgk00/social-media-scheduler/issues/20.
Backlog section: Tests.

## Problem

The transcode worker processor — which handles download/transcode/upload/DB-update — has no unit test coverage. Tests only verify the factory creates a Worker with the right options. The error handler (marks media as failed, nested catch for DB write failure, temp file cleanup) is entirely untested.

Also: media-cleanup tests missing DB delete failure path, and duplicated mock setup across 4 test files.

## Identified by

Code quality review Run 2 — test-quality-analyzer (findings 1, 2, 4, 8)

## Fix

- Capture processor via MockWorker pattern (same as media-cleanup.test.ts)
- Test: successful transcode, ffmpeg failure marks status as failed, DB failure during error path, temp file cleanup
- Extract shared mock-logger.ts and mock-bullmq.ts helpers
- Add vi.resetModules() to media-cleanup beforeEach

## Files

- `packages/worker/src/__tests__/transcode.test.ts`
- `packages/worker/src/__tests__/media-cleanup.test.ts`
- `packages/worker/src/__tests__/helpers/`

whyTestsDoNotAlreadyCoverThis: Imported from GitHub issue. Preserve or add focused regression coverage when the issue acceptance criteria calls for it.
